subject: June 14th, 2026
fact: The session takes place on June 14th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Jun 14th, 2026

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum is an unconscious Duergar found in a moss-covered chamber.
source_quote: unconscious Duergar named Thera Grabelthum

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum confessed to spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network.
source_quote: she confessed to spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum turned invisible and fled into the darkness during the ambush.
source_quote: Thera turned invisible and fled into the darkness

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum was killed in the chaos of the fight.
source_quote: Thera was killed in the chaos

subject: Zhentarim Black Network
fact: The Zhentarim Black Network is the organization Thera Grabelthum was spying for.
source_quote: spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz is a drow found bound and tormented in the rogue Mind Flayer's lair.
source_quote: The party discovers Arrizz bound and tormented

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz was cured of his demonic madness using a piece of magical mushroom.
source_quote: cures his demonic madness using a piece of magical mushroom

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz traveled with the party back to Sporedome.
source_quote: Arrizz traveling alongside them one last time

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz expressed a pragmatic hope that he would never see the party again unless they were there to save him.
source_quote: he hoped never to see them again, but if he did, he was certain it would be because they were coming to save him

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought is the mad Mind Flayer the party came to destroy.
source_quote: Rogue Thought — the mad Mind Flayer they had come to destroy

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought was sipping casually from a grisly brain jar when the party arrived.
source_quote: sipping casually from one of his grisly jars

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought identified Bramgrim as the greatest magical threat through mind-reading.
source_quote: whom he had identified through his mind-reading as the greatest magical threat

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought severed his own tentacles and dropped them to the ground before vanishing.
source_quote: he severed his own tentacles, dropped them to the ground, and vanished in a flash of planar magic

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought vowed revenge alongside Graz'zt before escaping.
source_quote: both he and Graz'zt would have their revenge

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Graz'zt is a demon lord referenced by Rogue Thought as seeking revenge.
source_quote: both he and Graz'zt would have their revenge

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Graz'zt's madness was being held back by brain-capped mushrooms.
source_quote: holding back the worst of Graz'zt's madness

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Graz'zt's corruption was the target of the fire giants' work in Szith Morcane.
source_quote: unleash Graz'zt's corruption upon the surface world

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana is the powerful and influential criminal matriarch of Hillsfar.
source_quote: Isthana, the city's powerful and influential criminal matriarch

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana invited the party to a private dinner in Hillsfar.
source_quote: promptly invited to a private dinner by Isthana

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana gave Felkur three bottles of rare wine as a personal gift.
source_quote: three bottles of rare wine — a personal gift to Felkur

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana implied that any business venture without her support would struggle in Hillsfar.
source_quote: any venture without her support would find the city a very difficult place to operate

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv is a wizard leading the Drow resistance in Szith Morcane.
source_quote: Drow resistance led by the wizard Murssvayas Dhuurniv

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur privately reflects on his secret past as the 'Phantom Thief'.
source_quote: Felkur privately reflects on his secret past as the 'Phantom Thief'

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim was identified by Rogue Thought as the greatest magical threat.
source_quote: whom he had identified through his mind-reading as the greatest magical threat

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim summoned a storm of spectral guardians during the battle.
source_quote: summoning a storm of spectral guardians

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim healed the injured and unconscious Owlbear after the combat ended.
source_quote: Bramgrim heals the injured and unconscious Owlbear

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim finished off the last surviving Githyanki warrior with necrotic energy.
source_quote: Bramgrim finished off the last surviving Githyanki warrior with a burst of necrotic energy

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas loosed precise and punishing arrows during the battle.
source_quote: Akritas loosed precise and punishing arrows from across the chamber

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas received a telepathic message from the Emerald Enclave.
source_quote: telepathic message arriving for Akritas from the Emerald Enclave

subject: Daein
fact: Daein led an assault against the Githyanki warriors.
source_quote: Daein leads an assault against the Githyanki

subject: Daein
fact: Daein delivered a relentless series of blows that drove Rogue Thought to the edge of destruction.
source_quote: Daein surged forward and delivered a relentless series of blows

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear was stunned and helpless by the intellect devourer's psychic blast.
source_quote: left the Owlbear stunned and helpless

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear charged through the far door and crashed into Rogue Thought.
source_quote: The Owlbear charged through the far door and crashed into Rogue Thought himself

subject: intellect devourer
fact: An intellect devourer emerged from a slain Githyanki warrior's skull.
source_quote: slain warrior's skull cracked open to reveal an intellect devourer

subject: intellect devourer
fact: The intellect devourer is described as a pulsating brain on legs.
source_quote: a pulsating brain on legs

subject: intellect devourer
fact: Felkur destroyed the intellect devourer with a firebolt.
source_quote: Felkur destroys the intellect devourer with a firebolt

subject: Githyanki warriors
fact: Two Githyanki warriors burst from the muck in a sudden ambush.
source_quote: two Githyanki warriors burst from the muck in a sudden ambush

subject: Githyanki warriors
fact: Four Githyanki warriors flanked Rogue Thought in the final chamber.
source_quote: Flanking him were four Githyanki warriors

subject: Githyanki warriors
fact: Two Githyanki warriors used their innate ability to teleport away from the spectral guardians.
source_quote: Two of the Githyanki warriors used their innate ability to teleport away

subject: Githyanki warriors
fact: Bramgrim finished off the last surviving Githyanki warrior.
source_quote: finished off the last surviving Githyanki warrior

subject: Rogue Mind Flayer's Lair
fact: The lair contains a moss-covered chamber where Thera Grabelthum was found.
source_quote: uncovering a moss-covered chamber where they found an unconscious Duergar named Thera Grabelthum

subject: freezing chamber
fact: The freezing chamber is kept cold by towering columns of ice.
source_quote: freezing chamber kept cold by towering columns of ice

subject: freezing chamber
fact: The freezing chamber contains a massive block of opaque ice preserving suspended brains.
source_quote: massive block of opaque ice preserving suspended brains

subject: freezing chamber
fact: Small vials of yellowish liquid were found in the freezing chamber.
source_quote: small vials of yellowish liquid

subject: freezing chamber
fact: Strange otherworldly symbols were visible in the freezing chamber.
source_quote: strange otherworldly symbols

subject: freezing chamber
fact: A hidden copper plate emblazoned with alien markings was found in the freezing chamber.
source_quote: A hidden copper plate emblazoned with alien markings lay tucked within the room

subject: freezing chamber
fact: A suspicious chest sat nearby in the freezing chamber.
source_quote: a suspicious chest sat nearby

subject: Mind Flayer's innermost sanctum
fact: The innermost sanctum walls are festooned with graven images of skulls and brains.
source_quote: walls festooned with graven images of skulls and brains

subject: Mind Flayer's innermost sanctum
fact: The innermost sanctum is shimmering with the alien pulse of concentrated Faerzress.
source_quote: shimmering with the alien pulse of concentrated Faerzress

subject: Mind Flayer's innermost sanctum
fact: Three tall, decorative brain jars stood at the center of the innermost sanctum.
source_quote: Three tall, decorative brain jars stood at the center of the room

subject: Mind Flayer's innermost sanctum
fact: A large pile of cushions was located at the center of the innermost sanctum.
source_quote: large pile of cushions

subject: Sporedome
fact: Sporedome is a fungal city where the party returned to report their success.
source_quote: made their way back through the Underdark to Sporedome

subject: Hillsfar
fact: Hillsfar is the surface city where the party returned and was invited to dinner.
source_quote: returned to Hillsfar

subject: Szith Morcane
fact: Szith Morcane is an Underdark city controlled by fire giants.
source_quote: fire giants controlling the Underdark city of Szith Morcane

subject: Dalelands
fact: The Dalelands are a location on the surface that fire giants have turned their eyes toward.
source_quote: toward the Dalelands and Hillsfar itself

subject: brain-capped mushrooms
fact: The party secured brain-capped mushrooms to hold back Graz'zt's madness.
source_quote: The brain-capped mushrooms the party had secured

subject: opals
fact: The party found two opals while searching the area.
source_quote: finding two opals

subject: circlet
fact: The party found a valuable circlet while searching the area.
source_quote: a valuable circlet

subject: chainmail pouch
fact: The party found a chainmail pouch of gold coins while searching the area.
source_quote: chainmail pouch of gold coins

subject: copper plate
fact: A hidden copper plate emblazoned with alien markings was found in the freezing chamber.
source_quote: hidden copper plate emblazoned with alien markings

subject: suspicious chest
fact: The party chose to leave a suspicious chest alone in the freezing chamber.
source_quote: one the party wisely chose to leave alone

subject: brains
fact: The party placed the brains they had collected at each of the sealed doors.
source_quote: placed the brains they had collected at each of the sealed doors

subject: decorative brain jars
fact: Rogue Thought sipped from one of the decorative brain jars.
source_quote: sipping casually from one of his grisly jars

subject: severed tentacles
fact: The party collected Rogue Thought's severed tentacles as proof of their victory.
source_quote: collected Rogue Thought's severed tentacles as proof of their victory

subject: rod of the pact keeper
fact: The Mind Flayer rewarded the party with a rod of the pact keeper.
source_quote: rewards the party with a rod of the pact keeper

subject: wand of the war mage
fact: The Mind Flayer rewarded the party with an upgraded wand of the war mage.
source_quote: an upgraded wand of the war mage

subject: rare wine
fact: Isthana presented Felkur with three bottles of rare wine.
source_quote: three bottles of rare wine — a personal gift to Felkur

subject: magical mushroom
fact: The party used a piece of magical mushroom to cure Arrizz's demonic madness.
source_quote: cures his demonic madness using a piece of magical mushroom

subject: Order of the Gauntlet
fact: The Mind Flayer promised to pass intelligence about Graz'zt's operations to the Order of the Gauntlet.
source_quote: pass vital intelligence about Graz'zt's operations to the Order of the Gauntlet

subject: Emerald Enclave
fact: The Emerald Enclave sent a telepathic message to Akritas.
source_quote: telepathic message arriving for Akritas from the Emerald Enclave

subject: fire giants
fact: Fire giants are controlling the Underdark city of Szith Morcane.
source_quote: fire giants controlling the Underdark city of Szith Morcane

subject: Drow resistance
fact: The Drow resistance in Szith Morcane is led by the wizard Murssvayas Dhuurniv.
source_quote: Drow resistance led by the wizard Murssvayas Dhuurniv

subject: ambush
fact: Two Githyanki warriors burst from the muck in a sudden ambush.
source_quote: two Githyanki warriors burst from the muck in a sudden ambush

subject: psychic blast
fact: The intellect devourer unleashed a devastating psychic blast that left the Owlbear stunned.
source_quote: unleashed a devastating psychic blast that left the Owlbear stunned and helpless

subject: fireball
fact: Felkur unleashed a massive fireball that engulfed the Mind Flayer and nearly every Githyanki warrior.
source_quote: unleashed a massive fireball that roared through the chamber and engulfed the Mind Flayer and nearly every Githyanki warrior

subject: tentacle severing
fact: Rogue Thought severed his own tentacles and dropped them to the ground.
source_quote: severed his own tentacles, dropped them to the ground

subject: planar escape
fact: Rogue Thought vanished in a flash of planar magic to escape to another dimension.
source_quote: vanished in a flash of planar magic, escaping to another dimension entirely

subject: dinner invitation
fact: The party was invited to a private dinner by Isthana in Hillsfar.
source_quote: promptly invited to a private dinner by Isthana

subject: telepathic message
fact: Akritas received a telepathic message from the Emerald Enclave warning of fire giants.
source_quote: telepathic message arriving for Akritas from the Emerald Enclave

subject: Graz'zt's corruption
fact: The party is tasked with stopping the spread of Graz'zt's madness and corruption.
source_quote: stop the spread of Graz'zt's madness and drive out the fire giants

subject: business venture
fact: The party floated the idea of starting a business in Hillsfar.
source_quote: party floated the idea of starting a business in the city

subject: revenge vow
fact: Rogue Thought vowed that he and Graz'zt would have their revenge.
source_quote: both he and Graz'zt would have their revenge
